title: Crispy Chicken Avocado Pita
tagline: Crispy chicken, smashed avocado and garlic mayo folded into a toasted pita — tastes like a restaurant wrap.
macroNotes: Estimated for 200 g nuggets + 1 pita + 75 g avocado + 15 g garlic mayo per pita. The mayo and avocado push the fat right up.
These particular nuggets are protein-poor for their calories (211 kcal / 11 g protein per 100 g — lots of breading), so the protein-to-calorie ratio is mediocre.

Best swap for macros: replace most of the garlic mayo with a sauce of 50 g Greek yogurt + 1 tsp garlic mayo + lemon. That drops each pita to ~550 kcal / ~32 g protein and tastes closer to a proper shawarma.
Air-frying the nuggets (no extra oil) instead of pan/oven keeps the fat down. Adding shredded chicken breast or extra egg is the cleanest way to lift protein.

items: 24 chicken nuggets (~400 g total, 12 per pita)
2 tbsp garlic mayo (~15 g per pita)
Optional: hot sauce, pickled jalapeños or pickled onions

steps.title: Crisp the nuggets
steps.body: Air-fry the 24 nuggets at 200°C for 8–10 min (or per packet in the oven) until very crispy. Crispiness is the whole point — don't pull them early.

steps.title: Make the avocado smash
steps.body: Mash 150 g avocado with a good squeeze of lemon, a pinch of salt and black pepper.

steps.title: Prep the veg
steps.body: Shred the lettuce and slice 1 tomato and a few red onion rings.

steps.title: Warm the pitas
steps.body: Heat each pita on a dry pan for 30–45 sec a side so it's soft and foldable.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.body: Onto each pita spread half the avocado smash, then lettuce, tomato, onion, 12 nuggets (halved for easier eating), a drizzle of 1 tbsp garlic mayo and hot sauce if using. Add pickles here if you have them.

steps.title: Final toast
steps.body: Fold each pita and press it on a hot pan for 1–2 min a side. This crisps the outside and is what makes it taste like a restaurant wrap rather than an assembled snack.

notes: Pickled jalapeños or pickled onions are the biggest upgrade for almost no calories — the acidity cuts through the mayo and avocado. A squeeze of lemon over the nuggets right before wrapping does the same.
For a leaner build, use 8–10 nuggets, load up on lettuce/tomato/onion, and swap most of the mayo for a Greek yogurt garlic sauce.
source: Adapted from my own cooking notes.
